name: House Contarini (Vilikari)
agenda: Expand trade routes into Acasia and monopolize the grain trade
keyNPCs: Tema — Vilikari merchant and grain factor
Factor Voss — Mid-level bureaucrat under audit
The Archivolot — Notary who seals fates with wax
The Federate King — Paramount ruler of the Vilikari
resources: Trade network, legal influence, grain, shipping, forged charters
hooks: A rival house is undercutting their prices
The Valvano Ford is locked—grain cannot move
Tema has invested everything in this trade route
description: House Contarini is one of the great Vilikari trading houses, controlling grain shipments, legal charters, and diplomatic connections across the Amaranthine. They are not a noble house in the traditional sense—they are a family of merchants whose wealth exceeds that of most kings.
